Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
AHC Model Data File Codebook │ December 2024 │ V 1.0 134 

SR_CORE_HOUSNG_1_CD 

LABEL: Core HRSN Housing 1: Current Living Situation 

DESCRIPTION: Screening result (SR) core health related social need (HRSN) housing – current living situation. 

LONG NAME: SR_CORE_HOUSNG_1_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: AHC data system 

VALUES: 1 = Steady place to live 
2 = Worried lose housing 
3 = No steady housing 
Missing
